span.p:
Broqwser
[Web Broqwser]
Used by a user to browse
the website

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Mobile Application
[Xamarin Application]Unsupported markdown: br Allows members to view and review titles
from their mobile devices

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
In-memory cache
[Redis]
Titles and their reviews are cached

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Message Broker
[Kafka]
Important domain events
are publsihed to Kafka

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Title Service
[Software System]
Provides an API to retrieve
title information

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Reviews Service
[Software System]
Provides an API to retrieve
and submit reviews

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Search Service
[Software System]
Provides an API to searchUnsupported markdown: br for titles

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Title Controller
[ASP.NET MVC Controller]
Allows users to view details
about titles

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Search Controller
[ASP.NET MVC Controller]
Allows users to searchUnsupported markdown: br for titles

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Review Controller
[ASP.NET MVC Controller]
Allows users to read andUnsupported markdown: br write reviews

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Title Component
[ASP.NET Namespace]
Provides information on titles,
retrieves information from the title service
and caches titles

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Search Component
[ASP.NET Namespace]
Searches titles using the
search service

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Review Component
[ASP.NET Namespace]
Provides review information,
submits new reviews
and publishes domain events
